title: A community proposal to integrate proteomics activities in ELIXIR.
author: Vizcaino JA Walzer M Jimenez RC Bittremieux W Bouyssie D Carapito C Corrales F Ferro M Heck AJR Horvatovich P Hubalek M Lane L Laukens K Levander F Lisacek F Novak P Palmblad M Piovesan D Puhler A Schwammle V Valkenborg D van Rijswijk M Vondrasek J Eisenacher M Martens L Kohlbacher O
content: S-EPMC5499783 PMC5499783 A community proposal to integrate proteomics activities in ELIXIR. Computational approaches have been major drivers behind the progress of proteomics in recent years. The aim of this white paper is to provide a framework for integrating computational proteomics into ELIXIR
